items.name_en: This Lady D-Joy mini handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Lady D-Joy mini handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
D.I.O.R. Charms
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 16 x 9 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Style No.: S0910

specs.rawTitle:

Crafted from black calfskin, the stylish and timeless design is enduring. Adorned with cannage stitching and accented with light gold-finish metal D.I.O.R. charms to elevate the style. Equipped with a detachable chain shoulder strap and a detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily or evening looks.
D.I.O.R. Charms
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap

items.name_en: [Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
items.name_cn:
[Top-tier Original Box] Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. The new 1955 series reimagines the Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag, combining versatility with practicality. Crafted from classic beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, the zip closure and adjustable shoulder strap add depth to the design. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, gold-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail. Inside: 1 card slot, external pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (55cm high). Zip closure.
Model: 760196.
Dimensions: 20(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Brown/PVC. (287718)
